title: Shanghai Study Abroad
html:
Shanghai Study Abroad

The fall-2024 CIEE program at East China Normal University (ECNU) that gave Yahir formal cover to spend six months in Shanghai — the move that turned itself into the broader China chapter. Funded jointly by JCEF (operational) and Ford (foundational), coordinated through Mei Dong for the visa side. The program was the vehicle; the chapter became the event.

The pre-trip logistics live in 2024 05 13 things and 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip — May–June 2024 — where the Shanghai admin sits inside a finals push: ALGOS midterm, Cloud Dev assignments, CS362 demo, India/Nepal backpack route research, CIEE paperwork, Ford coordination via Zane, JCEF coordination via Quin, "Sign up for class then drop it" (the funding-admin loophole), Lola's vet farewell, "print out lola picture", and the OpenAI GPT-4o announcement landed as "a monumental moment that may decide the future of what I do, idk??" The whole transition from OSU-student-life to China-chapter-life is contained in those six weeks of running todos.

The lived Shanghai opens with 2024 09 12 never forget do whatever — the 14-line manifesto written ~1 week into the semester, the most concentrated first-principles self-talk doc in the corpus. "Walk as if god sent you, because he did. The internal flame within you is always alive… God favors those that max effort commit. You are going to die soon. Your life is like a rainbow." Shanghai is where the recurring spiritual lexicon (flame, rainbow, void, soul as beacon) gets defined and stabilized. By 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future (Oct 30, ~6 weeks before departure) the manifesto has condensed into a thesis: "Not feeling great about working and traveling the wrld is something that you have already done. Building something starting work that is the foundation of your legacy is the next step." Shanghai is the chapter where Yahir decides, while still inside it, that the next chapter is build mode — and the Austin move and Brotein launch follow directly from that decision.

The operational layer is in 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook: ECNU oral/written midterms, contact list of locals to meet (Tesla giga factory, Shanghai Lawyer, Sean Michael Floyd, Dorian Dragon, Lachy Groom, Julien Bouteloup), CIEE payments, Shanghai sidequests, Valeria visit planning (multi-night hotels, train to Beijing, Forbidden City + Great Wall tickets, gift list with Emilio's Shanghai Sharks jersey). Shanghai-as-base, China-as-radius — the Chengdu and Xi'an trips both pull from this base.

Reverse-cited from later notes: 2024 09 28 thoughts real estate financing, 2024 10 31 dominic rebuild, 2024 12 28 ideas list, 2025 11 01 austin places all reference Shanghai retroactively as the formative chapter. It's the most-back-referenced experiential anchor in the corpus.

Source summaries

  • 2024 09 07 voice memo 0208 — 2 AM Shanghai arrival-window music-only clip
  • 2024 09 12 never forget do whatever
  • 2024 09 23 east china normal university putuo campus zaoyang road 788 haomen 2 — Mandarin oral practice on hometown prompt
  • 2024 09 28 thoughts real estate financing

  • 2024 10 31 dominic rebuild
  • 2024 12 28 ideas list
  • 2025 11 01 austin places
